title: Temperatures seen surging as El Nino weather pattern returns | Reuters
description: Temperatures are expected to soar across large parts of the world after the El Nino weather pattern emerged in the tropical Pacific for the first time in seven years, the World Meteorological Organization said on Tuesday.
bodyText: Reporting by Gabrielle Tétrault-Farber; Editing by Andrew Heavens, Alex Richardson and Christina Fincher Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
